indicators.name: table obstructing floor
indicators.rationale: The glass coffee table is placed in the middle of the floor, obstructing any potential yoga mat placement.

indicators.name: bottles on table
indicators.rationale: Bottles on the table are not conducive to a yoga environment, as they could pose a tripping hazard and disrupt the flow of movement.

indicators.name: magazine on table
indicators.rationale: A magazine on the table can be a distraction and may not be suitable for a focused yoga practice.

indicators.name: chairs obstructing floor
indicators.rationale: The white armchairs are placed close to each other, leaving little room for a yoga mat to be laid out without obstruction.

indicators.name: potted plant in corner
indicators.rationale: The potted plant in the corner takes up valuable floor space and could potentially obstruct a yoga mat.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is completely unsuitable for yoga or stretching due to the presence of furniture and objects that obstruct the floor space and create a cluttered environment. The score of 1 reflects the inability to perform any yoga-related activity in this space.
